workflows.name: Agent Suggestions
workflows.description: Suggests agentic workflows and improvements for the repository based on analysis of current setup.

workflows.name: Automated Documentation
workflows.description: Analyzes documentation for gaps, outdated content, and inconsistencies; creates issues and PRs to improve docs.

workflows.name: Automerge
workflows.description: Enables auto-merge for approved dependency-update PRs that meet merge-ready criteria.

workflows.name: Dependency Review
workflows.description: Analyzes dependency-update PRs from bots, applies merge-ready labels when criteria are met.

workflows.name: Duplicate Issue Detector
workflows.description: Detects potential duplicate issues when a new issue is opened or when the entrypoint is run manually.

workflows.name: Issue Triage
workflows.description: Triages newly opened issues using the generic issue-triage agentic workflow.

workflows.name: Security
workflows.description: Runs static security checks on workflows, shell scripts, and dependency manifests per the security scanning ruleset; opens issues for findings.

workflows.name: Resource Not Accessible by Integration
workflows.description: Detects 'Resource not accessible by integration' occurrences in workflow logs, creates triage issues, triages newly opened issues, and executes fixes for issues labeled ready to fix.
